sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28669" key="dusanalhyi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσανα-ληψία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28669.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">difficult convalescence</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:236:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">236.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
